title: lantana cujabensis var. hispida
intro: Lantana cujabensis var. hispida, also known as Hispid Lantana, is a plant species within the Lantana genus, characterized by its unique appearance and medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various ailments due to its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hispid Lantana include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, reduce fever, and soothe digestive problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
